message:
perf(fts5): reduce FTS5 cursor memory by separating scores from document columns

Two optimizations to FTS5 query memory usage:

1. Posting lists changed from Vec<Posting> to SmallVec<[Posting; 1]>,
   inlining single-posting terms (the common case for rare terms) and
   avoiding heap allocation for them entirely.

2. Fts5Cursor.results narrowed from Vec<(i64, f64, Vec<String>)> to
   Vec<(i64, f64)> — column data is no longer duplicated into every
   result tuple. Instead, columns are looked up from self.documents on
   demand via rowid. Adds search_docids_with_weights_from_parts() to
   avoid materializing document columns when only scores are needed.

Reduces peak memory proportional to result_count * column_count for
ranked FTS5 queries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
